description: Composition Green and blue quilted jacket made of 100% polyester, has long sleeves with elasticated cuffs, mock neckline, zippered closure on the front, zippered pockets on either sides,inner zippered pocket and brand swoosh printed on the left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry on low This quilted jacket from nike is perfect for chilly weather. The green and blue panels give this jacket an added edge, while the polyester fabric offers lightweight comfort and superior warmth. Team it with t-shirts and jeans. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6'1" and chest 33"
